name: 16"x58" Turned/Bobbin Floor Mirror - Room Essentials™
description:
Stylish and practical, this Turned/Bobbin Floor Mirror from Room Essentials™ is a versatile and elegant addition to any room. This rectangular mirror is adorned with a wooden bobbin frame in a natural finish for a timeless look. Easy to mount on a wall, you can hang it vertically or horizontally with the help of pegs or screws to elevate your home aesthetics and help you check your reflection before heading out.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
